cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this ethical dilemma. So, the situation is that someone is a single parent struggling financially. They're stealing food from work to feed their family, and their child finds out. Now they have to decide whether to keep stealing (which would mean losing their child's respect) or stop and risk their family's survival. Hmm, that's tough.
